ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "plot_code" TEXT /* Code or name of the plot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the plot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the plot */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the plot in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_events" (
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire event */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot where the fire occurred */,
  "fire_year" INTEGER /* Year the fire event occurred */,
  "fire_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fire (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "fire_area" REAL /* Area affected by the fire (in square meters) */,
  "fire_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the fire in days */,
  "fire_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fire (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_events_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_deficits" (
  "deficit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water deficit record */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "ann_def_mm" REAL /* Annual water deficit in millimeters */,
  "ann_def_mm_norm" REAL /* Normalized annual water deficit */,
  "anom_def_mm" REAL /* Anomaly in annual water deficit in millimeters */,
  "anom_def_zscore" REAL /* Anomaly in annual water deficit as a z-score */,
  "water_stress_index" REAL /* Water stress index (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deficit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_deficits_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atmospheric condition record */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "summer_vpd_kpa" REAL /* Summer vapor pressure deficit in kilopascals */,
  "summer_vpd_kpa_norm" REAL /* Normalized summer vapor pressure deficit */,
  "anom_summer_vpd_kpa" REAL /* Anomaly in summer vapor pressure deficit in kilopascals */,
  "anom_summer_vpd_zscore" REAL /* Anomaly in summer vapor pressure deficit as a z-score */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_conditions_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_plots" (
  "project_plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-plot association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot */,
  "plot_role" TEXT /* Role of the plot in the project (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_plots_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_plots_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the sensor is installed in */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the satellite is collecting data for */,
  "satellite_type" TEXT /* Type of the satellite (e.g., Landsat, MODIS) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the satellite was launched */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the satellite in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellites_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot the data version belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)
